title: Another sqllitelogictest crash :(
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tab0(col0 INT, col1 INT, col2 INT NOT NULL, col3 VARCHAR(50));
CREATE TABLE tab2(col0 INT, col1 INT, col2 INT DEFAULT 0, col4 FLOAT);
INSERT INTO tab0(col0, col1, col2, col3) VALUES (1, 10, 100, 'test1'), (2, 20, NULL, 'test2'), (3, 30, 300, 'test3');
INSERT INTO tab2(col0, col1, col2, col4) VALUES (1, 10, 200, 1.5), (2, NULL, 300, 2.5);
SELECT DISTINCT - COUNT(DISTINCT col1) AS col1 FROM tab0 CROSS JOIN tab2;
key_bug_features: CROSS JOIN with DISTINCT and COUNT in SQL query
